---
title: "Press"
description: "Press and media coverage"
toc-expand: 2
image: ../static/images/swirl-mascot-1000.png
format: html
---

## 2024

- ["Why do we code?" and other musings with Carol Willing](https://www.opensourcestories.org/stories/2024/carol-willing-why-we-code/), Open Source Stories.

## 2023

- [Elevating Open Source Contributors to Open Source Maintainers](https://github.blog/2023-06-01-elevating-open-source-contributors-to-open-source-maintainers/), GitHub Blog

## 2022

- [Everything Open Source: Women in Open Source](https://mesrenyamedogbe.hashnode.dev/women-in-open-source-edition-1)

## 2021

- [PyLadies Mentorship Group Helps Women Python Developers](https://www.businessinsider.com/pyladies-python-programming-language-software-developers-women-2021-3), Business Insider.

- [How Python is building a welcoming community for women](https://github.com/readme/featured/women-in-tech-python), The ReadMe Project, GitHub.

- [Reactive, reproducible, collaborative: computational notebooks evolve](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-021-01174-w), Nature (Jeff Perkel).

## 2020

- [Governance Q & A Blog with Carol Willing](https://engineering.salesforce.com/governance-q-a-blog-with-carol-willing-294f5135a767/), Salesforce Engineering blog Oct 07.

- [A Lifelong Learner](https://us-rse.org/rse-stories/2020/carol-willing/), RSE Stories.

- [Where Programming Languages are Headed in 2020](https://www.oreilly.com/radar/where-programming-languages-are-headed-in-2020/), O'Reilly Radar.

## 2019

- [Learning git: Locations, Remotes, and GitHub](https://www.willingconsulting.com/blog/posts/2019-07-01-locations-and-git.html), Willing Consulting.

## 2018

- [Why Jupyter is data scientists' computational notebook of choice](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-018-07196-1), Nature (Jeff Perkel).

- [Jupyter Insights: Carol Willing](https://www.oreilly.com/content/jupyter-insights-carol-willing/), O'Reilly.

- Featured Chapter in [Python Interview by Mike Driscoll](https://subscription.packtpub.com/book/web-development/9781788399081/3/ch03/carol-willing), Packet Publishing.

- [ASK AN ENGINEER 2/14/18 - Special guest Carol Willing](https://blog.adafruit.com/2018/02/10/ask-an-engineer-2-14-18-special-guest-carol-willing-willingcarol-projectjupyter-askanengineer/), Adafruit blog.

## 2015

- [Django Girls Blog - Your Django Story: Meet Carol Willing](https://blog.djangogirls.org/post/107597215478/your-django-story-meet-carol-willing)

- [PyDev of the Week: Carol Willing](
https://www.blog.pythonlibrary.org/2015/10/12/pydev-of-the-week-carol-willing/)

## Interviews and Profiles

- ["It all goes back to what's best for the community": An interview with Python's Carol Willing](https://relational-tech.com/blog/carol-willing-interview.html), Relational Tech.

- [Python Interviews: Carol Willing](https://www.oreilly.com/library/view/python-interviews/9781788399081/ch03.html), O'Reilly.
